details: SWISH uses SFPU_OP_SWISH_INCLUDE macro, compute kernel eltwise_sfpu.cpp, init=swish_tile_init(), func=swish_tile(i), non-parameterized, approx_mode=false (default case)

Read unary_op_utils.cpp - atanh uses eltwise_sfpu.cpp compute kernel, SFPU_OP_CHAIN_0 expands to atanh_tile(0), init is atanh_tile_init(), approx_mode=false (default case), macro=SFPU_OP_ATANH_INCLUDE
sinh_tile() dispatches to llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_sinh<APPROX>(idst), init dispatches to llk_math_eltwise_unary_sfpu_sinh_init<APPROX>()
HARDTANH not found in get_op_init_and_func_parameterized or get_op_init_and_func_default - searching broader codebase for dispatch path

Found ckernel_sfpu_swish.h in both wormhole_b0 and blackhole - identical implementations. Uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if). Piecewise sigmoid approx: polynomial for |x|<=2.5, linear for 2.5<|x|<=5, saturate to 1.0 for |x|>5. swish = x * sigmoid(x).

Read ckernel_sfpu_sinh.h (identical on WH/BH). Uses exp_21f helper for 2^z computation, Taylor approx for small |x|. Params dispatch uses VectorMode::RC with 4 faces x 8 iterations. ADDR_MOD_7 with all increments=0 (sinh is not in any special ADDR_MOD_6 case).

APPROX resolved: get_op_approx_mode(ATANH) returns false (default case). No parameterized template version exists for atanh. atanh_tile_init<APPROX>() resolves to atanh_tile_init<false>(). The APPROXIMATION_MODE template parameter is false but is not actually used in the atanh implementation - the code path is the same regardless.

HARDTANH has core SFPU kernel (ckernel_sfpu_hardtanh.h) in WH and BH. No API header, no LLK dispatch layer exists. The operation is registered in SfpuType/ActivationType enums and has params in unary_op_types but the SFPU_OP_CHAIN dispatch (get_op_init_and_func) is not yet wired up.

key_findings: Uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if). Piecewise sigmoid approx: polynomial for |x|<=2.5, linear for 2.5<|x|<=5, saturate for |x|>5. Identical on WH and BH.

addr_mod: ADDR_MOD_7(zero increments) on both WH and BH

note: TANHSHRINK has no case in get_op_init_and_func_default, would TT_THROW at runtime. No dedicated SFPU kernel exists.

init_func: NOT WIRED - no case in get_op_init_and_func_parameterized or get_op_init_and_func_default
tile_func: NOT WIRED - no hardtanh_tile API exists

key_findings: IEEE 754 decomposition ln(y)=e*ln2+P(m) with cubic minimax poly, applied twice for ln(1+x) and ln(1-x), identical WH/BH implementations

No ckernel_sfpu_tanhshrink.h exists. No tanhshrink_tile/tanhshrink_tile_init functions anywhere. Operation is a stub: enum+header registered but no SFPU implementation. Comment in unary_composite_op.cpp says tanhshrink(x) = x - tanh(x), confirming composite origin.

WH and BH implementations are identical. Uses SFPI abstractions (vFloat, dst_reg, v_if/v_endif). Implements branchless clamping via three additions and two conditional zeroing blocks. Takes 3 uint32 params (negated thresholds in FP16_B format).

note: No SFPU kernel to analyze - stub operation
STUB OPERATION - no SFPU kernel exists
